title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Cyient

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Cyient
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Cyient in Navi Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cyient:
Cyient is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cyient!
